title: Pre recorded Lecture Part A Slides
body:
Dr Linh Nguyen, Course Convenor
Lecturer
UNSW Centre for Social Impact
Email: linh-nguyen@unsw.edu.au
 ▪   Project management refers to the application
    of knowledge, skills, tools, and techniques to
    project tasks in order to fulfill project
    requirements.
▪   It includes processes of planning, organizing,
    securing, leading, and managing resources
    effectively to accomplish specific objectives
    within defined timeframes, budgets, and
    constraints
                                                     Image: Stanford University

Source: Turner (2014); Portny and Portny (2022)



                                                                                  2
 Consulting is the practice of providing expert advice and services to organizations in
addressing complex business challenges and improving performance (Deelmann 2019)


Consultants help organizations improve their performance, solve problems, and achieve their strategic
goals through Identifying problems and opportunities, conducting research and analysis, co-creating
devise actionable improvement strategies (Institute of Management Consultants Australia; Bain &
Company).
Consultants can specialize in various areas, such as management, finance, marketing,
operations, etc.


In this unit, your group acts as a consulting team specializing in social entrepreneurship. Each enterprise presents unique
challenges, requiring consultants to assess their business model, organizational structure, and core competencies. The
industry partner/ client expects you to provide valuable advice on addressing their challenges and enhancing their operation
and social impact.


                                                                                                                               3
 https://project-management.com

   CLEARLY DEFINED      DOCUMENTATION   MEASUREMENT OF
PROJECT DELIVERABLES                      SUCCESS



                                                        5
 ▪ Work Breakdown Structure
  (WBS)
▪ Software Tools for WBS
▪ Gantt Chart
▪ Resource Allocation and
  Timeframes                 Image: https://venngage.com/




                                                            6
 Task implementation:
 • Executing project tasks according to the approved plan
 • Following established processes and standards
 • Data Collection
 • Data Analysis

Resource management
 • Allocating and managing project resources (human, material, etc)
 • Optimizing resource utilization and addressing resource conflicts

Team Management, Communication and collaboration
 • Fostering effective collaboration, communication, and adherence to processes within the project team to
   ensure optimal productivity and synergy.
 • Maintaining open communication channels all parties
 • Conducting regular meetings and sharing project updates

                                                                                                             7
                      Performance
Progress Tracking                      Risk Management
                     Measurement




 Change Control     Status Reporting     Adjustment



                                                         8
            Delivering and presenting results
to clients/ Project Closure
Deliverables and Handover:
• Clearly outline the final deliverables and their status. Explain the handover process for
  completed products, documentation, and knowledge transfer.
• Review and ensure that all project deliverables have been completed and meet the
  specified requirements
Clarity and Comprehension:
Consultants must articulate recommendations in a clear, concise manner to facilitate
comprehension and foster meaningful dialogue.
Tailored Solutions to Client Needs:
  • Clarity and Comprehension
  • Tailored Solutions
